modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Upgrade needed for SMART Notebook software on USD computers

full_description_text:  
The SMART Notebook software on my USD computer is currently running in Limited Mode, which is affecting my ability to use its full features. I believe an upgrade is necessary to resolve this issue and restore normal functionality. I would appreciate assistance in getting the software updated so I can continue my work without interruptions. Thank you!
